entries.description: Impeachment: Perjury and obstruction of justice related to the Monica Lewinsky affair and Paula Jones lawsuit
entries.causation_evidence: House Judiciary Committee impeachment articles and Senate trial records

entries.description: Rwanda genocide inaction: Refusal to intervene or label events as genocide despite clear warnings; over 800,000 killed
entries.causation_evidence: UNAMIR reports, Clinton's later apology, and declassified National Security Archive documents

entries.description: NAFTA implementation: Massive U.S. manufacturing job losses and wage suppression for working-class Americans
entries.causation_evidence: Economic Policy Institute studies and U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics data

entries.description: Welfare reform (Personal Responsibility and Work Opportunity Act): Dramatic cuts to safety net leading to increased poverty among single mothers and children
entries.causation_evidence: Center on Budget and Policy Priorities and Urban Institute long-term studies

entries.description: Whitewater / Madison Guaranty scandal: Real estate dealings and improper influence on regulators
entries.causation_evidence: Independent Counsel Robert Fiske and Kenneth Starr reports

entries.description: Pardons scandal: Last-minute pardons including Marc Rich (fugitive tax evader) and others tied to major donors
entries.causation_evidence: House Government Reform Committee report and independent counsel findings

entries.description: Kosovo intervention without congressional approval: 78-day bombing campaign with civilian casualties
entries.causation_evidence: Congressional Research Service and NATO after-action reports

entries.description: Don't Ask Don't Tell policy: Institutionalized discrimination against LGBTQ service members
entries.causation_evidence: Department of Defense reports and congressional hearings

entries.description: Antiterrorism and Effective Death Penalty Act: Severe restrictions on habeas corpus and due process
entries.causation_evidence: Congressional records and subsequent Supreme Court rulings

entries.description: Lewinsky affair cover-up and grand jury perjury: Public denial followed by impeachment proceedings
entries.causation_evidence: Starr Report and House impeachment proceedings

entries.description: Health care reform failure (Hillarycare): Massive defeat after secretive task force process
entries.causation_evidence: Congressional Budget Office and GAO reports

entries.description: Waco siege handling: FBI assault on Branch Davidian compound resulting in 76 deaths
entries.causation_evidence: Department of Justice and congressional investigation reports

entries.description: China WTO admission and permanent normal trade relations: Accelerated U.S. manufacturing decline
entries.causation_evidence: Economic Policy Institute and U.S. Trade Representative reviews

entries.description: Balanced federal budget and surplus: First surplus in decades with strong economic growth
entries.causation_evidence: Congressional Budget Office and Treasury Department records

entries.description: Oslo Accords facilitation: Major step toward Israeli-Palestinian peace process
entries.causation_evidence: Official White House and State Department records
